Flowlu offers multiple task views—like Kanban, list, or calendar—so you can visualize work the way that suits your team best. With all your data in one place, making informed decisions is simpler than ever. It's all about reducing the effort of daily tasks, so you can focus on what really matters—growing your business and delivering value to your clients.

# Best SugarCRM Alternatives (2026) – Top CRM Software Options

Best SugarCRM Alternatives: Find a Better CRM for Your Business
===============================================================

![Ethan Kim](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/35392/ethan_kim-1.png)

Ethan Kim

Content Specialist

February 6, 2025

9 min read

Table of contents

*   [What is SugarCRM?](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/sugarcrm/#title_0)
    
*   [Where SugarCRM Falls Short](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/sugarcrm/#title_1)
    
*   [How to Choose the Right CRM Alternative](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/sugarcrm/#title_2)
    

Experience the power of organized workflows

Sign up for free to access Flowlu's project templates. Available for new accounts only.

[Start With Template](https://www.flowlu.com/templates/)

![Best SugarCRM Alternatives: Find a Better CRM for Your Business](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/35374/sugarcrm.776x0.webp)

If you pick the right CRM, it can make a big difference in how effectively your business runs. Have you been using SugarCRM or considering it? Then, you might have noticed that it’s not the perfect fit for everyone.

Some customers love its comprehensive features, while others find its UX clunky or difficult to work with.

Before you switch to something else, it is useful to understand what SugarCRM does well, what it lacks, and what to look for in a better SugarCRM alternative. Let’s break it down.

What is SugarCRM?
-----------------

SugarCRM is a customer relationship management online tool that helps businesses organize contacts, track sales, and manage customer interactions. It offers handy features like lead tracking, sales automation, and reporting. Many companies use it to keep customer data in one place and improve how they handle relationships.

Where SugarCRM Falls Short
--------------------------

While SugarCRM has its strengths, real user reviews highlight some frequent frustrations:

*   **Clunky Interface** – Some customers find the UX/UI a bit outdated and not as intuitive as other CRMs have. It can take time to get used to.
*   **Performance Issues** – There are reports of slow performance, especially on SugarCRM’s hosted version. This can be frustrating for teams that need a fast and reliable system for their sales and lead management.
*   **Customization Can Be Tricky** – While it offers flexibility, setting up advanced customizations often requires technical knowledge. This makes it harder for non-technical teams to make changes on their own.
*   **Pricing Concerns** – Some users feel it’s expensive for what it offers, especially when considering additional costs for customizations and integrations.

These limitations lead many small businesses to explore alternatives that are easier to use, more affordable, or offer better support.

How to Choose the Right CRM Alternative
---------------------------------------

If you’re thinking about switching, here’s what to keep in mind:

*   **Ease of Use** – A good CRM should be simple and intuitive, so your team actually wants to use it and keep all their data in one place.
*   **Essential Features** – Look for a CRM system that covers your needs without unnecessary complexity. [Sales tracking](https://www.flowlu.com/features/crm/)
    , automation, and integrations are key.
*   **Scalability** – Make sure your new CRM can grow with your business, whether that means handling more users, data, [client projects](https://www.flowlu.com/features/projects/)
     or advanced features.
*   **Customer Support** – Having responsive support can save you a lot of time when things don’t work as expected. A comprehensive help center with video tutorials are also vital.
*   **Cost vs. Value** – Price matters, but you need to focus on what you’re actually getting for your money. Some client management tools might seem cheaper but lack important features or require expensive add-ons.

Finding the right CRM doesn’t have to be complicated. The best CRM choice is one that fits your business needs, budget, and team workflow. And, certainly, it should not make things harder than they need to be.

Free and Paid SugarCRM Competitors & Alternatives for 2025
----------------------------------------------------------

![Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34119/flowlu.png)

Flowlu

CRM That Connects Everything

[Try For Free](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

Flowlu is an all-in-one platform that brings together CRM, project management, client portal, knowledge base, and financial tracking tools. The CRM includes features for sales process automation and gives businesses a clear view of their customer journey. Multiple sales pipelines and custom fields make it adaptable for tracking leads and opportunities. It supports contact management, email and telephony integration, and automated workflows. Built-in web forms allow you to capture leads effortlessly. Customizable dashboards and detailed reports help you monitor performance and stay organized. Flowlu integrates with numerous third-party apps, allowing you to integrate it with your existing tools effortlessly. The platform is recognized for its cost-effectiveness, making it an attractive option for small and medium-sized businesses. Its feature set and pricing provide a practical solution for teams seeking a reliable client management tool.

![Zoho CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34120/zoho.png)

Zoho CRM

AI-Powered Client Connections

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/zoho-crm/)

Zoho CRM helps you stay connected with your clients by using AI to automate your CRM processes. It has tools for managing deals, contacts, and workflows. You can communicate with prospects directly through email, phone, or social media. Beyond the basics, it offers advanced features like business intelligence and sales forecasting. However, some users find it has a steep learning curve, higher costs, and slower support.

![Hubspot](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34121/hubspot.png)

Hubspot

Real-Time Customer Insights

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/hubspot/)

HubSpot is a well-known CRM that lets you track sales activity in real time. It’s great for building a central spot to store all your customer info. You get email tracking, handy templates, and integrations with Gmail and Outlook. Also, you can create custom dashboards, dig into analytics, and handle email campaigns like a pro. It’s got forms for lead capturing, plus segmentation tools and even chatbots to keep things moving. For solo entrepreneurs and small businesses, the cost can really sting. So, while it’s got bells and whistles, it might not fit every budget.

![SuiteDash](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34122/suitedash.png)

SuiteDash

Centralized Sales & Service

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/suitedash/)

SuiteDash calls itself a client portal software but also includes a CRM with tools for managing sales funnels. It helps you keep all client information in one place and offers automation features like scheduling follow-ups and creating new contacts automatically. You can choose from four different styles to monitor pipelines from various aspects. It also provides client onboarding tools like forms, checklists, and proposals. However, users often mention the platform feels slow and overwhelming during setup due to the many modules and unclear connections between them.

![Freshsales](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34123/freshsales.png)

Freshsales

Simplified AI-Driven Selling

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/freshsales/)

Freshsales is an AI-powered CRM to make selling easier. Its Freddy AI helps you run targeted campaigns, qualify leads with intent scores, and gives you useful recommendations. The platform is all about automation to reduce manual tasks and features a simple interface. Freshsales provides customizable sales reports, and tools to create outreach campaigns. It integrates with email, messaging apps, SMS, Zoom, chat, and phone systems. There's also a marketplace for connecting with hundreds of popular apps. However, many users find the reporting and analysis tools overly complex, which can be a significant drawback.

![Vtiger](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34124/vtiger_2x.png)

Vtiger

Advanced CRM Made Simple

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/vtiger/)

Vtiger is a user-friendly CRM that connects with over 500 apps. It includes advanced tools for lead routing and prospect segmentation. The mobile app is especially handy, supporting voice notes and business card scanning. Vtiger also offers email marketing features, automated email sequences, and integrations with phone, chat, SMS, and websites. It helps you create forecast scenarios and predict estimated sales revenue. Still, many users mention that customer support could be improved.

![BaseCRM](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34125/basecrm_2x.png)

BaseCRM

Effortless Sales Simplification

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/basecrm/)

BaseCRM, now Zendesk Sell, focuses on simplifying sales tracking. It helps organize leads, track deals and activities, and automate repetitive tasks. You can also set up automation rules and triggers to streamline client journeys. Email tools and mobile access make it useful for teams on the move. Users appreciate its clean interface and reporting options. Still, some customers occasionally complain about slow customer service responses.

![Agile CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34127/agile_crm_2x.png)

Agile CRM

Integrated Sales and Marketing

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/agilecrm/)

Agile CRM combines sales tracking, marketing, and customer service into one platform. It’s geared toward SMBs and includes tools like email campaigns and deal tracking. Agile CRM gives business tools for predictive analytics and sales forecasting, plus it offers multiple views. The free plan is a bonus for startups. Many users praise its affordability and variety of features. On the downside, performance can dip with larger datasets.

![Streak](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34128/streak_2x.png)

Streak

CRM Inside Your Inbox

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/streak/)

Streak works directly in Gmail, so there’s no need to switch between platforms. It helps you manage contacts and track sales within your inbox. The tool supports email tracking, templates, and integrations with Google apps. It’s great for keeping things simple. It has filters, sorting and grouping options to keep your data clean. That said, users report that the mobile version lacks some desktop features.

![Copper](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34129/copper_2x.png)

Copper

Google Workspace CRM Partner

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/copper/)

Copper works within Google Workspace, letting you manage sales and leads right from Gmail. It simplifies tasks like contact tracking and pipeline updates. Many users like its clean, intuitive design. You can also set up the workflow automation, so Copper will do the tasks for you. However, its reporting tools can feel basic. Some also mention limitations in the mobile app.

![Nimble](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34130/nimble.png)

Nimble

Social Media-Enhanced CRM

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/nimble/)

Nimble merges CRM with social media. You can track contacts, monitor conversations, and manage email outreach all in one place. It stands out for its ability to connect with various platforms. Nimble also offers ready-made templates with pre-defined fields and stages for your workflows. That said, reporting options are fairly minimal. This can be a drawback for users who need deeper insights.

![Nutshell](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34131/nutshell.png)

Nutshell

CRM for Growing Teams

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/nutshell/)

Nutshell caters to small businesses with features for email integration, sales automation, and team collaboration. The interface is straightforward, and the pricing fits tighter budgets. Nutshell provides native integrations, connections through 3rd-party apps and AppConnect. On the downside, its customization options are limited. Larger teams might outgrow it quickly.

![Salesforce](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34132/salesforce.png)

Salesforce

Scalable Power for Teams

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/salesforce/)

Salesforce is packed with features for managing sales, customer support, and marketing. It’s ideal for big teams needing scalable tools. Salesforce is integrated with AI, which means it can write emails for you, generate summaries, or provide real-time predictions, among other options. But all those features come at a price. Many users also mention the platform feels overwhelming without proper training.

![Insightly](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34133/insightly.png)

Insightly

CRM Meets Project Management

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/insightly/)

Insightly combines CRM and project management. It’s handy for keeping track of both customers and tasks in one system. Insightly includes business process automation to free your team from routine tasks. You can also create real-time reports to visualize your sales data. The integration options are useful, but the interface feels clunky to some. Reporting tools, while functional, are less detailed than what many users expect.

![Pipedrive](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34134/pipedrive.png)

Pipedrive

Visual Pipelines, Simplified Sales

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/pipedrive/)

Pipedrive focuses on keeping sales organized. It uses a clean, visual pipeline to track deals and activities. You can automate tasks like follow-ups and reminders, and save time and efforts for your team. Email integration makes communication easy. Pipedrive also offers automated sales conversations with AI-powered prompts and insights. Users like its simplicity and find it easy to pick up. However, reporting features feel basic to some. Perhaps, Pipedrive could benefit if they implement more in-depth analytics for their clients.

![Bitrix24](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34135/bitrix24.png)

Bitrix24

Collaboration Meets CRM

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/bitrix24/)

Bitrix24 offers a versatile mix of CRM, communication, and project management tools. It lets teams collaborate through video calls, email tracking, and shared workspaces. Automated notifications via SMS or email can be set up to keep clients informed without manual effort. An AI assistant is included to help generate marketing content and brainstorm ideas, saving time for your team. Many users appreciate the wide range of tools available. It’s affordable, especially for smaller teams. On the downside, the interface can be overwhelming. Slow system performance is another common complaint.

![Kommo](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34136/kommo_2x.png)

Kommo

Messaging-Based Sales Simplified

Kommo focuses on messaging-based sales. It connects directly with apps like WhatsApp, Messenger, and Telegram. This makes real-time communication with leads simple. You can automate follow-ups and track deals easily. Kommo’s AI features help you to create summaries of your conversations or suggest replies. The interface is clean, and most features are intuitive. Customization, though, is somewhat limited. Support response times could also be better.

![EngageBay](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34137/engagebay_2x.png)

EngageBay

Affordable All-In-One CRM

EngageBay is a great option for small businesses. It incorporates marketing, sales, and service tools into one platform. EngageBay’s main features include email campaigns, lead generation, and a helpdesk. You can integrate SMS, track opens and link clicks. The free plan makes it appealing to startups. Many users like its range of options. Some, however, report bugs in the system. The learning curve can also be steep for beginners.

![Less Annoying CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34138/less_annoying_crm_2x.png)

Less Annoying CRM

Simplified CRM for SMBs

Less Annoying CRM keeps things simple. It’s built for small businesses that need basic tools. Contact and task management are easy to set up. The interface is clean, with no unnecessary extras. It’s affordable too, which users love. It integrates well with calendar apps, email, invoicing software, VOIP, web forms, video communication tools and other software you may utilize. That said, it lacks advanced features. There’s also no dedicated app for mobile use.

![monday Sales CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34139/monday_sales_crm_2x.png)

monday Sales CRM

Customizable Sales Tracking

monday Sales CRM offers flexibility for tracking deals and managing contacts. Built on the monday.com platform, it integrates easily with other tools. Automation options help reduce repetitive tasks. Teams enjoy the drag-and-drop customization. Its AI features let you generate tasks, compose emails, summarize calls and so much more. However, the setup process can take time. For smaller businesses, the price might feel high. Some users also find it overly reliant on custom workflows.

![NetHunt](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34140/nethunt_2x.png)

NetHunt

CRM Inside Gmail Workflow

NetHunt turns Gmail into a CRM. It allows you to manage deals and automate workflows without leaving your inbox. Email tracking and follow-ups are straightforward. It’s great for teams already using Google Workspace. NetHunt also includes reminders, calendar sync, and mentions for team collaboration. Many users praise its seamless integration. On mobile, though, certain features are missing. Larger teams may also feel it lacks advanced reporting.

![Pipeline](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34141/pipeline_2x.png)

Pipeline

Organized Sales Made Easy

Pipeline CRM simplifies sales processes. It tracks deals, contacts, and tasks in one place. Reporting tools offer basic insights into team performance. The interface is user-friendly and doesn’t overwhelm. Pipeline CRm automates workflows, sends reminders to your colleagues and suggests next steps. Customer service is quick and helpful, which users appreciate. Still, customization is limited. Reports could also use more depth for detailed analysis.

![Salesflare](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34142/salesflare_2x.png)

Salesflare

Automated CRM for SMBs

Salesflare is a CRM specialized in automating data entry for SMBs. It tracks emails, calls, and meetings automatically. The system also pulls contact details from online sources, saving users time. Many appreciate its simple setup and clean interface. Email tracking and pipeline management are popular features. However, customization options are limited. Some users feel the mobile app lacks important features found in the desktop version. For smaller teams, the software is a great fit and meets most needs. Larger companies, however, may find it too limiting for more complex workflows.

![Creatio CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34143/creatio-1.png)

Creatio CRM

CRM with Process Automation

Creatio blends CRM tools with process automation in one platform. It simplifies lead management, tracks sales, and handles workflows. The system adapts to fit various business needs. Users praise its flexibility. Teams can build unique solutions quickly. However, setup can be overwhelming due to its many options. New users often report needing additional training to get started. Once configured, it’s reliable for streamlining operations. Advanced reporting tools make it appealing to data-driven teams. On the downside, customer support response times could improve.

![Close](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34144/close_2x.png)

Close

Unified Communication Hub

Close brings email, SMS, and calls together in one place. It simplifies how teams connect with prospects and leads. A single inbox keeps all conversations organized. Close’s automation tools help with follow-ups and reminders. Reporting tools offer insights into team performance. Users find it straightforward to set up and use. However, some find the pricing steep for smaller teams. Customization is another area where it falls short. For teams that prioritize communication, it’s a solid choice.

![Capsule](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34145/capsule_2x.png)

Capsule

Essentials for Small Business

Capsule CRM focuses on simplicity and small business needs. It organizes contacts, tracks sales, and manages tasks in one place. Users like its straightforward design and affordable pricing. It integrates well with tools like Xero and Mailchimp. However, advanced features like workflow automation are missing. Reporting tools are basic but sufficient for smaller teams. The mobile app works well but could include more features. It’s a good option for businesses needing the essentials without the clutter.

![Breakcold](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34146/breakcold_2x.png)

Breakcold

CRM Meets Social Selling

Breakcold combines CRM functions with social selling tools. It tracks interactions on LinkedIn, Twitter, and email in one platform. Users can engage prospects directly from the dashboard. It’s great for teams focused on relationship-building. However, traditional CRM features like deal tracking and task automation are limited. The interface can also feel clunky to new users. Social media-driven teams appreciate its niche approach. For those needing broader functionality, it might not be the best fit.

![Folk](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34147/folk_2x.png)

Folk

Collaborative CRM for Teams

Folk is a modern CRM that emphasizes collaboration and simplicity. It lets teams manage contacts, assign tasks, and track interactions in one place. The interface is minimalistic and easy to navigate. It’s especially useful for small teams managing shared responsibilities. However, it lacks some advanced features seen in older CRMs. Integration options are still growing, which may limit its appeal. Bugs are occasionally reported by users. It works best for startups and smaller teams.

![CRMOne](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34148/crmone_2x.png)

CRMOne

Streamline Customer Interactions

CRMOne provides basic tools for contact management, sales tracking, and marketing automation. It’s designed to cover the essentials without overwhelming users. Many appreciate its straightforward interface. However, reviews suggest that the features are limited compared to competitors. Advanced analytics and integration options are lacking. Some users feel it’s best suited for teams with very simple needs. It’s an option for those who value simplicity over depth.

![BigContacts](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34149/bigcontacts_2x.png)

BigContacts

Contact Management Simplified

BigContacts focuses on contact management and email marketing for small to medium businesses. It features automated follow-ups and simple email templates. Users like its intuitive layout and helpful support team. However, reporting tools are basic and may not satisfy data-heavy teams. The mobile app could also benefit from additional features. It’s a solid choice for businesses that prioritize email campaigns and client organization. For more complex workflows, it may fall short.

FAQs

See the most answers to the most frequently asked questions. You can find even more information in the knowledge base.

[Knowledge base](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

What is the best SugarCRM alternative for small businesses?

Many small businesses prefer simpler and more affordable CRM programs with strong client management features. Some free or cheaper CRM tools also work well as SugarCRM replacements.

Are there free SugarCRM alternatives for Mac, Windows, and Android?

Yes, several CRM applications offer free versions for different platforms, including Mac, Windows, and Android. These tools provide basic client management, sales tracking, and integration with business systems.

What are the top SugarCRM competitors with offline access?

If you need an offline CRM, look for software that offers local data storage and syncs when online. Some CRM platforms provide desktop applications for Windows and Mac that work even without an internet connection.

# Scoro Alternatives: Best Project Management Tool Comparison

Best Scoro Alternatives: Find Your Perfect Project Management Tool
==================================================================

![Leah Brooks](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32588/leah_brooks.png)

Leah Brooks

Writer

October 17, 2024

7 min read

Table of contents

*   [Limitations of Scoro](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/scoro/#title_0)
    
*   [What to Look for in Scoro Competitors & Alternatives](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/scoro/#title_1)
    

Experience the power of organized workflows

Sign up for free to access Flowlu's project templates. Available for new accounts only.

[Start With Template](https://www.flowlu.com/templates/)

![Best Scoro Alternatives: Find Your Perfect Project Management Tool](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32570/scoro.776x0.webp)

Managing a business means balancing operations, client management, and projects.

Scoro is popular in this space, but it might not suit everyone. If you’re looking for alternatives, here are some solid options and reasons to consider switching.

Limitations of Scoro
--------------------

While feature-packed, Scoro has some downsides:

*   **Complex Setup:** Scoro’s many features can make it hard to learn and use.
    
*   **High Cost:** Its pricing may be too expensive for growing teams or small businesses.
    
*   **Limited Customization:** Tailoring workflows and dashboards can feel restrictive.
    

What to Look for in Scoro Competitors & Alternatives
----------------------------------------------------

When switching tools, look for solutions that:

*   **Are User-Friendly:** A clean interface helps reduce the learning curve.
    
*   **Offer Flexible Pricing:** Choose a tool that scales with your needs without being expensive.
    
*   **Allow Customization:** Find a platform that adapts to your business style.
    
*   **Integrate Well:** Ensure the tool works with your existing software.
    
*   **Support Collaboration:** Look for features that help teams communicate and stay on track.
    

Best Project Management Alternatives to Scoro
---------------------------------------------

![Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/31510/flowlu_4.png)

Flowlu

Your all-in-one work management solution

[Try For Free](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

Flowlu brings together team collaboration, client and project management, document generation, knowledge sharing, mind maps, and financial tracking, all in one place. With Flowlu, you can automate those repetitive tasks that slow you down. Rely on real-time reporting to get insights into what’s working and where you can improve. Flowlu offers multiple task views—like Kanban, list, or calendar—so you can visualize work the way that suits your team best. With all your data in one place, making informed decisions is simpler than ever. It's all about reducing the effort of daily tasks, so you can focus on what really matters—growing your business and delivering value to your clients.

![Smartsheet](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/31514/smartsheet-1.png)

Smartsheet

Project tracking with a familiar spreadsheet touch

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/smartsheet/)

Smartsheet’s spreadsheet-style interface makes it easy to track projects, collaborate with teams, and automate workflows. From detailed Gantt charts to simple task lists, it adapts to fit any team’s needs. Manage everything from big-picture strategy to everyday tasks in one flexible workspace.

![ProofHub](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32067/proofhub-1.png)

ProofHub

Comprehensive project control

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/proofhub/)

ProofHub offers an all-in-one platform for project management and team collaboration. Plan, organize, and deliver projects efficiently while keeping communication centralized. With features like task timelines, online proofing, and built-in chat, your team stays connected and in sync. It’s a comprehensive solution that brings clarity and control to your workflows.

![Zoho One](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32068/zoho_one_2x.png)

Zoho One

Complete business suite

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/zoho-one/)

Zoho One is a full-fledged business platform with over 40 integrated apps, covering everything from sales to marketing to project management. It streamlines your operations by keeping all your tools under one login. Customize and scale the platform as your business grows, without worrying about the complexity of managing multiple systems.

![Trello](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32070/trello.png)

Trello

Agile team management

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/trello/)

Trello’s classic boards and cards make it easy (and even a bit fun) to see your projects at a glance. Create, organize, and move tasks through your workflow with just a few clicks. Whether it's a personal to-do list or a team project, Trello keeps everything simple and right where you need it.

![Jira](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32071/jira.png)

Jira

Agile Project management for dev teams

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/jira/)

Jira is built for development teams that need powerful tools for tracking tasks, bugs, and features. It supports both Scrum and Kanban methodologies, offering deep customization and reporting features. Automate workflows and gain visibility into your project’s progress, all while integrating seamlessly with your existing tools.

![ActiveCollab](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32072/activcolab.png)

ActiveCollab

All-in-one tool for smart teams

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/activecollab/)

ActiveCollab helps you manage tasks, track time, and collaborate with your team all in one place. Its intuitive interface makes project management feel effortless, allowing you to focus on getting things done. From task assignments to invoicing clients, ActiveCollab covers every aspect of your workflow.

![WorkflowMax](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32073/workflowmax_2x.png)

WorkflowMax

Project lifecycle manager

WorkflowMax handles your entire project lifecycle, from lead generation to invoicing. Perfect for service-based businesses, it simplifies time tracking, task management, and financial reporting. With detailed insights into project profitability, you’ll always know where your business stands.

![Dubsado](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32074/dubsado_2x.png)

Dubsado

Client-centric project tool

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/dubsado/)

Dubsado combines CRM, project management, and invoicing in one powerful platform designed for client-facing businesses. From sending contracts to managing client communications, Dubsado automates routine tasks so you can focus on delivering great work. Its clean interface makes it easy to keep track of projects, schedules, and invoices all in one place.

![Favro](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32075/favro_2x-1.png)

Favro

Agile team collaboration

Favro helps teams adapt and scale with flexible workflows and real-time collaboration. Manage sprints, projects, and roadmaps with an intuitive platform that grows with your team. Track progress, adjust priorities, and collaborate across departments—all from one adaptable tool.

![LiquidPlanner](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32078/liquidplanner_2x-1.png)

LiquidPlanner

Predictive project scheduling

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/liquidplanner-portfolio-manager/)

LiquidPlanner uses predictive scheduling to give teams a clear view of timelines and resources. It dynamically adjusts as priorities shift, ensuring your team stays focused on the most important tasks. The platform’s real-time forecasting tools let you manage uncertainty and make informed decisions.

![Basecamp](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32079/basecamp.png)

Basecamp

Simplified team collaboration

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/basecamp/)

Basecamp makes it easy for teams to collaborate by keeping everything—tasks, files, messages—organized in one place. With its clean interface and intuitive layout, you’ll never feel overwhelmed by clutter. It’s a straightforward tool for teams that need a simple way to stay in sync.

![Nifty](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32081/nifty.png)

Nifty

Real-time project tracker

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/nifty/)

Nifty combines task management, collaboration, and project timelines in one intuitive platform. Plan and track your projects from start to finish with real-time updates that keep everyone aligned. Nifty’s easy-to-use interface and automation features make it ideal for growing teams that need flexibility.

![ProjectLibre](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32083/projectlibre_2x-1.png)

ProjectLibre

Open-source project manager

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/projectlibre/)

ProjectLibre is a free, open-source alternative to expensive project management tools like Microsoft Project. With robust features like Gantt charts, task tracking, and resource management, it’s ideal for teams on a budget. ProjectLibre is powerful enough to handle complex projects but simple enough for everyday use.

![Bitrix24](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32084/bitrix24.png)

Bitrix24

Integrated business collaboration

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/bitrix24/)

Bitrix24 combines project management, communication, and CRM into a single, integrated platform. Manage tasks, collaborate with your team, and keep client information organized—all without leaving the app. Designed for small teams and large organizations alike, Bitrix24 offers the tools you need to streamline operations.

![TeamGantt](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32086/teamgantt_2x-1.png)

TeamGantt

Simple Gantt chart management

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/teamgantt/)

TeamGantt simplifies project planning with its intuitive drag-and-drop Gantt chart interface. Visualize your tasks, set dependencies, and keep your team aligned on deadlines, all with minimal setup. It’s perfect for teams that want an easy way to track project progress without complicated software.

![Plutio](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32087/plutio_2x-1.png)

Plutio

Freelancer business management

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/plutio/)

Plutio is built for freelancers and small teams who need an all-in-one solution to manage tasks, clients, and invoices. It offers everything you need to run your business seamlessly, including project tracking and communication, without the need to switch between tools. Customizable workflows allow you to manage projects your way, and integrated invoicing helps you get paid faster.

![Microsoft Project](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32088/ms_projects_2x-1.png)

Microsoft Project

Advanced project planning

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/microsoft-project/)

Microsoft Project is a comprehensive tool for planning, scheduling, and managing projects of any size. With its powerful Gantt charts, resource management tools, and reporting features, it’s the go-to platform for project managers worldwide. Customize your workflows, allocate resources, and track progress with real-time data.

![Airtable](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32089/airtabl.png)

Airtable

Flexible task database

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/airtable/)

Airtable blends the simplicity of a spreadsheet with the power of a database to give you a flexible workspace for managing any project. Organize your tasks, data, and projects in a way that makes sense for your team, with customizable views and powerful automations. Airtable’s adaptability makes it perfect for everything from content planning to product development.

![Redmine](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32090/redmine.png)

Redmine

Open-source task tracking

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/redmine/)

Redmine is a versatile, open-source project management tool designed for teams that need flexibility. Track issues, tasks, and timelines while integrating seamlessly with your favorite tools. Ideal for managing software development or running agile sprints, Redmine provides a customizable experience that adapts to your workflow.

![Planview](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32091/planview_2x-1.png)

Planview

Enterprise project management

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/planview-clarizen/)

Planview (former Clarizen) provides enterprise-grade project management with robust features designed for large-scale operations. It’s perfect for teams that need advanced tracking, resource allocation, and collaboration tools in one centralized platform. Plan, execute, and deliver complex projects while gaining real-time insights into every aspect of your workflow.

![Accelo](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32092/accelo_2x-1.png)

Accelo

Service business automation

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/accelo/)

Accelo is built for service-based businesses that need to manage projects, clients, and billing all in one place. Track time, automate workflows, and keep projects on schedule, all while ensuring client satisfaction. Accelo integrates every part of your service delivery process, from lead generation to invoicing.

Avaza

Cloud-based team collaboration

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/avaza/)

Avaza brings together project management, team collaboration, and invoicing into a single, cloud-based platform. Organize tasks, track time, and manage client communications without the need for separate tools. Its clean interface and powerful features make it a great choice for teams seeking to simplify workflows and boost productivity.

![Paymo](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32094/paymo_2x-1.png)

Time tracking with billing

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/paymo/)

Paymo is designed for teams and freelancers who need to manage projects, track time, and handle billing from one central platform. It’s perfect for businesses that want a seamless way to stay on top of tasks, deadlines, and client invoicing. Paymo’s real-time tracking and reporting give you full visibility into project progress and profitability. It’s an all-in-one solution for those who want to manage work and payments effortlessly.

Client process automation

HoneyBook offers a complete client management solution for freelancers and small businesses. From proposals and contracts to payments, it helps you streamline your entire client process. Its automation features take the hassle out of onboarding and invoicing, so you can focus on delivering great work.

![YouTrack](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32096/youtrack_2x-1.png)

YouTrack

Agile development tracking

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/youtrack/)

YouTrack offers an agile project management experience tailored for development teams. Track tasks, bugs, and sprints with customizable workflows and advanced reporting features. Its powerful search capabilities and real-time updates keep your team on top of every task.

Asana

Workflows made simple

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/asana/)

Asana is a project management tool that helps teams stay organized and keep track of tasks. It’s great for planning, assigning responsibilities, and visualizing project timelines with a simple interface. With features like boards, lists, and integrations, Asana makes managing both small and large projects very straightforward.

![Wrike](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32098/wrike.png)

Wrike

Real-time team alignment

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/wrike/)

Wrike is built for teams needing detailed visibility into their projects. It offers tools for managing tasks, tracking time, and collaborating in real time, all from one platform. Wrike’s customizable dashboards and reporting make it easy to keep everyone aligned and on top of deadlines.

![Monday](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32099/mondey.png)

Monday

Visual task management

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/monday-com/)

Monday is a visual project management tool that adapts to your team's workflow. It lets you track projects, set up automations, and manage everything from daily tasks to big projects on a colorful, user-friendly interface. Its flexibility makes it ideal for teams of all sizes looking to streamline processes.

![ClickUp](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32100/clickup.png)

ClickUp

Customizable productivity hub

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/clickup/)

ClickUp is an all-in-one productivity platform where you can manage tasks, docs, goals, and more. It’s designed to replace multiple apps by combining project management, communication, and automation in one place. Customizable views and extensive integrations help teams tailor their workspace to fit their requirements.

![Teamwork](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/32101/teamwork_2x-1.png)

Teamwork

End-to-end project tracking

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/teamwork/)

Teamwork is a project management platform designed to streamline team collaboration. It allows companies to manage tasks, track time, and stay on top of project timelines with ease. With its client-focused features, Teamwork makes managing complex projects and keeping everyone aligned simple.

FAQs

See the most answers to the most frequently asked questions. You can find even more information in the knowledge base.

[Knowledge base](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

What are some alternatives to Scoro for project management?

Some good alternatives to Scoro are Flowlu, Asana, Monday.com, and Trello. These apps offer strong tools for task management, team collaboration, and client services, making them useful for businesses looking for similar features.

What project management tools are more affordable than Scoro?

For a lower-cost option, you can try ClickUp, Flowlu, or Wrike. They offer better pricing along with strong customization and automation features, making them great for businesses that need to manage costs and get more flexibility.

Which Scoro alternatives work on Mac, Windows, and Android?

Apps like Flowlu, Notion, Teamwork, and Zoho Projects are compatible with Mac, Windows, and Android. They provide cross-platform access, allowing your team to stay in sync across devices.

Are there any free tools to replace Scoro?

Yes, there are free options like Flowlu, Trello, Airtable, and Bitrix24. These tools offer basic project and client management features, making them great for small businesses or startups.

What platforms like Scoro help with client and business management?

Flowlu, HubSpot, Monday.com, and Smartsheet are great for client and business management. They provide features for client communication, workflow automation, and project tracking, helping businesses work more efficiently.

# Best Streak CRM Alternatives: Top CRMs for Small Businesses

Streak CRM Alternative: Find the Best CRM for Your Business
===========================================================

![Emma Mitchell](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/35438/emma_mitchell.png)

Emma Mitchell

Writer

February 7, 2024

8 min read

Table of contents

*   [What Is Streak CRM?](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/streak/#title_0)
    
*   [Where Streak Falls Short](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/streak/#title_1)
    
*   [How to Pick the Right Alternative](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/streak/#title_2)
    

Experience the power of organized workflows

Sign up for free to access Flowlu's project templates. Available for new accounts only.

[Start With Template](https://www.flowlu.com/templates/)

![Streak CRM Alternative: Find the Best CRM for Your Business](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/35420/streak.776x0.webp)

When you run a business, it means juggling countless tasks, and managing customer relationships on an everyday basis. Many entrepreneurs use Streak CRM because it integrates directly into Gmail.

So, it makes it simple to track emails, manage pipelines, and stay on top of deals without leaving their inbox.

What Is Streak CRM?
-------------------

Streak is a CRM built inside Gmail. It is designed to help small teams and solo entrepreneurs manage customer interactions without switching between multiple apps. Streak CRM offers email tracking, mail merge, shared pipelines, and collaboration tools, all within the Gmail interface. This is a convenient choice for businesses already living in their inbox.

Where Streak Falls Short
------------------------

While Streak’s Gmail integration is a major plus, it’s not without its downsides. Based on real customer feedback from Capterra, G2, Crozdesk, and Trustpilot, here are some common complaints we found:

*   **Limited Mobile Experience:** The mobile app lacks full functionality, making it tough to manage workflows on the go.
*   **Manual Setup Hassles:** Some features require extra configuration, which can slow things down, especially for new users.
*   **Pricing Concerns:** For growing teams, costs can add up quickly as they move to higher-tier plans.
*   **Dependency on Gmail:** If you want to work outside of Gmail or need [deeper integrations with other tools](https://www.flowlu.com/integrations/)
    , Streak might feel restrictive for some teams.

How to Pick the Right Alternative
---------------------------------

If Streak isn’t meeting your needs, when you choose the right replacement, it comes down to a few key factors:

*   **Ease of Use:** A CRM should help you, not slow you down. Look for one that feels intuitive from day one.
*   **Flexibility & Integrations:** Need more than just email tracking? Consider tools that integrate with your other apps and scale as you grow.
*   **Mobile Accessibility:** If you're often working from your phone, a well-built mobile app is a must.
*   **Pricing That Makes Sense:** Some CRMs charge per user, while others offer flat-rate plans. Pick one that fits your budget now and in the future.

At the end of the day, the [best CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/features/crm/)
 is the one that fits naturally into your workflow. Try a few options, see what clicks, and go with the one that makes managing customer relationships easier—not harder.

Top Streak Alternatives and Competitors in 2025
-----------------------------------------------

![Flowlu](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34119/flowlu.png)

Flowlu

CRM That Connects Everything

[Try For Free](https://my.flowlu.com/register/)

Flowlu is an all-in-one platform that brings together CRM, project management, client portal, knowledge base, and financial tracking tools. The CRM includes features for sales process automation and gives businesses a clear view of their customer journey. Multiple sales pipelines and custom fields make it adaptable for tracking leads and opportunities. It supports contact management, email and telephony integration, and automated workflows. Built-in web forms allow you to capture leads effortlessly. Customizable dashboards and detailed reports help you monitor performance and stay organized. Flowlu integrates with numerous third-party apps, allowing you to integrate it with your existing tools effortlessly. The platform is recognized for its cost-effectiveness, making it an attractive option for small and medium-sized businesses. Its feature set and pricing provide a practical solution for teams seeking a reliable client management tool.

![Zoho CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34120/zoho.png)

Zoho CRM

AI-Powered Client Connections

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/zoho-crm/)

Zoho CRM helps you stay connected with your clients by using AI to automate your CRM processes. It has tools for managing deals, contacts, and workflows. You can communicate with prospects directly through email, phone, or social media. Beyond the basics, it offers advanced features like business intelligence and sales forecasting. However, some users find it has a steep learning curve, higher costs, and slower support.

![Hubspot](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34121/hubspot.png)

Hubspot

Real-Time Customer Insights

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/hubspot/)

HubSpot is a well-known CRM that lets you track sales activity in real time. It’s great for building a central spot to store all your customer info. You get email tracking, handy templates, and integrations with Gmail and Outlook. Also, you can create custom dashboards, dig into analytics, and handle email campaigns like a pro. It’s got forms for lead capturing, plus segmentation tools and even chatbots to keep things moving. For solo entrepreneurs and small businesses, the cost can really sting. So, while it’s got bells and whistles, it might not fit every budget.

![SuiteDash](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34122/suitedash.png)

SuiteDash

Centralized Sales & Service

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/suitedash/)

SuiteDash calls itself a client portal software but also includes a CRM with tools for managing sales funnels. It helps you keep all client information in one place and offers automation features like scheduling follow-ups and creating new contacts automatically. You can choose from four different styles to monitor pipelines from various aspects. It also provides client onboarding tools like forms, checklists, and proposals. However, users often mention the platform feels slow and overwhelming during setup due to the many modules and unclear connections between them.

![Freshsales](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34123/freshsales.png)

Freshsales

Simplified AI-Driven Selling

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/freshsales/)

Freshsales is an AI-powered CRM to make selling easier. Its Freddy AI helps you run targeted campaigns, qualify leads with intent scores, and gives you useful recommendations. The platform is all about automation to reduce manual tasks and features a simple interface. Freshsales provides customizable sales reports, and tools to create outreach campaigns. It integrates with email, messaging apps, SMS, Zoom, chat, and phone systems. There's also a marketplace for connecting with hundreds of popular apps. However, many users find the reporting and analysis tools overly complex, which can be a significant drawback.

![Vtiger](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34124/vtiger_2x.png)

Vtiger

Advanced CRM Made Simple

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/vtiger/)

Vtiger is a user-friendly CRM that connects with over 500 apps. It includes advanced tools for lead routing and prospect segmentation. The mobile app is especially handy, supporting voice notes and business card scanning. Vtiger also offers email marketing features, automated email sequences, and integrations with phone, chat, SMS, and websites. It helps you create forecast scenarios and predict estimated sales revenue. Still, many users mention that customer support could be improved.

![BaseCRM](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34125/basecrm_2x.png)

BaseCRM

Effortless Sales Simplification

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/basecrm/)

BaseCRM, now Zendesk Sell, focuses on simplifying sales tracking. It helps organize leads, track deals and activities, and automate repetitive tasks. You can also set up automation rules and triggers to streamline client journeys. Email tools and mobile access make it useful for teams on the move. Users appreciate its clean interface and reporting options. Still, some customers occasionally complain about slow customer service responses.

![SugarCRM](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34126/sugarcrm.jpg)

SugarCRM

Custom Dashboards, Seamless Automation

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/sugarcrm/)

SugarCRM offers tools for sale and marketing management, and customer support. This software is very adaptable and lets you create dashboards and reports that match your company’s needs. Automation features save time on routine tasks. SugarCRM integrates well with accounting tools, messengers, ERP and so on. While it offers plenty of features, some users find the interface tricky and the learning curve steep.

![Agile CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34127/agile_crm_2x.png)

Agile CRM

Integrated Sales and Marketing

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/agilecrm/)

Agile CRM combines sales tracking, marketing, and customer service into one platform. It’s geared toward SMBs and includes tools like email campaigns and deal tracking. Agile CRM gives business tools for predictive analytics and sales forecasting, plus it offers multiple views. The free plan is a bonus for startups. Many users praise its affordability and variety of features. On the downside, performance can dip with larger datasets.

![Copper](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34129/copper_2x.png)

Copper

Google Workspace CRM Partner

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/copper/)

Copper works within Google Workspace, letting you manage sales and leads right from Gmail. It simplifies tasks like contact tracking and pipeline updates. Many users like its clean, intuitive design. You can also set up the workflow automation, so Copper will do the tasks for you. However, its reporting tools can feel basic. Some also mention limitations in the mobile app.

![Nimble](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34130/nimble.png)

Nimble

Social Media-Enhanced CRM

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/nimble/)

Nimble merges CRM with social media. You can track contacts, monitor conversations, and manage email outreach all in one place. It stands out for its ability to connect with various platforms. Nimble also offers ready-made templates with pre-defined fields and stages for your workflows. That said, reporting options are fairly minimal. This can be a drawback for users who need deeper insights.

![Nutshell](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34131/nutshell.png)

Nutshell

CRM for Growing Teams

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/nutshell/)

Nutshell caters to small businesses with features for email integration, sales automation, and team collaboration. The interface is straightforward, and the pricing fits tighter budgets. Nutshell provides native integrations, connections through 3rd-party apps and AppConnect. On the downside, its customization options are limited. Larger teams might outgrow it quickly.

![Salesforce](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34132/salesforce.png)

Salesforce

Scalable Power for Teams

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/salesforce/)

Salesforce is packed with features for managing sales, customer support, and marketing. It’s ideal for big teams needing scalable tools. Salesforce is integrated with AI, which means it can write emails for you, generate summaries, or provide real-time predictions, among other options. But all those features come at a price. Many users also mention the platform feels overwhelming without proper training.

![Insightly](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34133/insightly.png)

Insightly

CRM Meets Project Management

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/insightly/)

Insightly combines CRM and project management. It’s handy for keeping track of both customers and tasks in one system. Insightly includes business process automation to free your team from routine tasks. You can also create real-time reports to visualize your sales data. The integration options are useful, but the interface feels clunky to some. Reporting tools, while functional, are less detailed than what many users expect.

![Pipedrive](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34134/pipedrive.png)

Pipedrive

Visual Pipelines, Simplified Sales

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/pipedrive/)

Pipedrive focuses on keeping sales organized. It uses a clean, visual pipeline to track deals and activities. You can automate tasks like follow-ups and reminders, and save time and efforts for your team. Email integration makes communication easy. Pipedrive also offers automated sales conversations with AI-powered prompts and insights. Users like its simplicity and find it easy to pick up. However, reporting features feel basic to some. Perhaps, Pipedrive could benefit if they implement more in-depth analytics for their clients.

![Bitrix24](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34135/bitrix24.png)

Bitrix24

Collaboration Meets CRM

[](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/bitrix24/)

Bitrix24 offers a versatile mix of CRM, communication, and project management tools. It lets teams collaborate through video calls, email tracking, and shared workspaces. Automated notifications via SMS or email can be set up to keep clients informed without manual effort. An AI assistant is included to help generate marketing content and brainstorm ideas, saving time for your team. Many users appreciate the wide range of tools available. It’s affordable, especially for smaller teams. On the downside, the interface can be overwhelming. Slow system performance is another common complaint.

![Kommo](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34136/kommo_2x.png)

Kommo

Messaging-Based Sales Simplified

Kommo focuses on messaging-based sales. It connects directly with apps like WhatsApp, Messenger, and Telegram. This makes real-time communication with leads simple. You can automate follow-ups and track deals easily. Kommo’s AI features help you to create summaries of your conversations or suggest replies. The interface is clean, and most features are intuitive. Customization, though, is somewhat limited. Support response times could also be better.

![EngageBay](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34137/engagebay_2x.png)

EngageBay

Affordable All-In-One CRM

EngageBay is a great option for small businesses. It incorporates marketing, sales, and service tools into one platform. EngageBay’s main features include email campaigns, lead generation, and a helpdesk. You can integrate SMS, track opens and link clicks. The free plan makes it appealing to startups. Many users like its range of options. Some, however, report bugs in the system. The learning curve can also be steep for beginners.

![Less Annoying CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34138/less_annoying_crm_2x.png)

Less Annoying CRM

Simplified CRM for SMBs

Less Annoying CRM keeps things simple. It’s built for small businesses that need basic tools. Contact and task management are easy to set up. The interface is clean, with no unnecessary extras. It’s affordable too, which users love. It integrates well with calendar apps, email, invoicing software, VOIP, web forms, video communication tools and other software you may utilize. That said, it lacks advanced features. There’s also no dedicated app for mobile use.

![monday Sales CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34139/monday_sales_crm_2x.png)

monday Sales CRM

Customizable Sales Tracking

monday Sales CRM offers flexibility for tracking deals and managing contacts. Built on the monday.com platform, it integrates easily with other tools. Automation options help reduce repetitive tasks. Teams enjoy the drag-and-drop customization. Its AI features let you generate tasks, compose emails, summarize calls and so much more. However, the setup process can take time. For smaller businesses, the price might feel high. Some users also find it overly reliant on custom workflows.

![NetHunt](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34140/nethunt_2x.png)

NetHunt

CRM Inside Gmail Workflow

NetHunt turns Gmail into a CRM. It allows you to manage deals and automate workflows without leaving your inbox. Email tracking and follow-ups are straightforward. It’s great for teams already using Google Workspace. NetHunt also includes reminders, calendar sync, and mentions for team collaboration. Many users praise its seamless integration. On mobile, though, certain features are missing. Larger teams may also feel it lacks advanced reporting.

![Pipeline](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34141/pipeline_2x.png)

Pipeline

Organized Sales Made Easy

Pipeline CRM simplifies sales processes. It tracks deals, contacts, and tasks in one place. Reporting tools offer basic insights into team performance. The interface is user-friendly and doesn’t overwhelm. Pipeline CRm automates workflows, sends reminders to your colleagues and suggests next steps. Customer service is quick and helpful, which users appreciate. Still, customization is limited. Reports could also use more depth for detailed analysis.

![Salesflare](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34142/salesflare_2x.png)

Salesflare

Automated CRM for SMBs

Salesflare is a CRM specialized in automating data entry for SMBs. It tracks emails, calls, and meetings automatically. The system also pulls contact details from online sources, saving users time. Many appreciate its simple setup and clean interface. Email tracking and pipeline management are popular features. However, customization options are limited. Some users feel the mobile app lacks important features found in the desktop version. For smaller teams, the software is a great fit and meets most needs. Larger companies, however, may find it too limiting for more complex workflows.

![Creatio CRM](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34143/creatio-1.png)

Creatio CRM

CRM with Process Automation

Creatio blends CRM tools with process automation in one platform. It simplifies lead management, tracks sales, and handles workflows. The system adapts to fit various business needs. Users praise its flexibility. Teams can build unique solutions quickly. However, setup can be overwhelming due to its many options. New users often report needing additional training to get started. Once configured, it’s reliable for streamlining operations. Advanced reporting tools make it appealing to data-driven teams. On the downside, customer support response times could improve.

![Close](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34144/close_2x.png)

Close

Unified Communication Hub

Close brings email, SMS, and calls together in one place. It simplifies how teams connect with prospects and leads. A single inbox keeps all conversations organized. Close’s automation tools help with follow-ups and reminders. Reporting tools offer insights into team performance. Users find it straightforward to set up and use. However, some find the pricing steep for smaller teams. Customization is another area where it falls short. For teams that prioritize communication, it’s a solid choice.

![Capsule](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34145/capsule_2x.png)

Capsule

Essentials for Small Business

Capsule CRM focuses on simplicity and small business needs. It organizes contacts, tracks sales, and manages tasks in one place. Users like its straightforward design and affordable pricing. It integrates well with tools like Xero and Mailchimp. However, advanced features like workflow automation are missing. Reporting tools are basic but sufficient for smaller teams. The mobile app works well but could include more features. It’s a good option for businesses needing the essentials without the clutter.

![Breakcold](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34146/breakcold_2x.png)

Breakcold

CRM Meets Social Selling

Breakcold combines CRM functions with social selling tools. It tracks interactions on LinkedIn, Twitter, and email in one platform. Users can engage prospects directly from the dashboard. It’s great for teams focused on relationship-building. However, traditional CRM features like deal tracking and task automation are limited. The interface can also feel clunky to new users. Social media-driven teams appreciate its niche approach. For those needing broader functionality, it might not be the best fit.

![Folk](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34147/folk_2x.png)

Folk

Collaborative CRM for Teams

Folk is a modern CRM that emphasizes collaboration and simplicity. It lets teams manage contacts, assign tasks, and track interactions in one place. The interface is minimalistic and easy to navigate. It’s especially useful for small teams managing shared responsibilities. However, it lacks some advanced features seen in older CRMs. Integration options are still growing, which may limit its appeal. Bugs are occasionally reported by users. It works best for startups and smaller teams.

![CRMOne](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34148/crmone_2x.png)

CRMOne

Streamline Customer Interactions

CRMOne provides basic tools for contact management, sales tracking, and marketing automation. It’s designed to cover the essentials without overwhelming users. Many appreciate its straightforward interface. However, reviews suggest that the features are limited compared to competitors. Advanced analytics and integration options are lacking. Some users feel it’s best suited for teams with very simple needs. It’s an option for those who value simplicity over depth.

![BigContacts](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/34149/bigcontacts_2x.png)

BigContacts

Contact Management Simplified

BigContacts focuses on contact management and email marketing for small to medium businesses. It features automated follow-ups and simple email templates. Users like its intuitive layout and helpful support team. However, reporting tools are basic and may not satisfy data-heavy teams. The mobile app could also benefit from additional features. It’s a solid choice for businesses that prioritize email campaigns and client organization. For more complex workflows, it may fall short.

FAQs

See the most answers to the most frequently asked questions. You can find even more information in the knowledge base.

[Knowledge base](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

What is a good Streak CRM alternative for Mac, Windows, and Android?

Many CRM software options work across multiple platforms, including Mac, Windows, and Android. Look for a cloud-based CRM that syncs across devices so you can access your data from anywhere.

Is there a free CRM like Streak but with more features?

Yes, several free CRM programs offer features similar to Streak, plus additional tools for automation, integrations, and mobile access. Some also provide free plans with upgrade options for growing businesses.

What are the top Streak CRM competitors for small businesses?

The best Streak alternatives for small businesses include CRM software with strong client management, automation, and pipeline tracking features. Options with simple setups and affordable pricing tend to work best for small teams.

# Top Sunsama Alternatives for Task & Calendar Management

Best Sunsama Alternatives: Find the Right Daily Planner for You
===============================================================

![Oliver Carter](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/35748/oliver_carter-1.png)

Oliver Carter

Copywriting Specialist

February 14, 2025

8 min read

Table of contents

*   [What is Sunsama?](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/sunsama/#title_0)
    
*   [Where Does Sunsama Fail?](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/sunsama/#title_1)
    
*   [How to Choose the Best Sunsama Free Alternative](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/sunsama/#title_2)
    

Experience the power of organized workflows

Sign up for free to access Flowlu's project templates. Available for new accounts only.

[Start With Template](https://www.flowlu.com/templates/)

![Best Sunsama Alternatives: Find the Right Daily Planner for You](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/35730/sunsama.776x0.webp)

Sunsama is great for planning, but is it the right fit for you? Let’s dive into its limitations and explore better task management alternatives—especially ones that won’t break the bank.

Sunsama is good for task and schedule management but not for every team. Let’s see what Sunsama offers, where it falls short and how to choose the best alternative for task management.

What is Sunsama?
----------------

Sunsama is a daily planner app that helps you organize your tasks and manage calendars. It integrates with Google Calendar and Outlook to centralize your workflow for better focus and productivity.

Where Does Sunsama Fail?
------------------------

While Sunsama has its strengths, users have noted a few areas where it could improve:

*   Sunsama is designed for individual use and **lacks basic features for team collaboration**. So some might say it’s not good for managing projects across teams.
*   Sunsama **doesn’t offer a free plan**, only a 14-day free trial. After that the subscription can be a barrier for some customers.
*   Although Sunsama integrates with some popular tools, its **range of native integrations is limited**. This can be restrictive for users who rely on many apps.
*   The **mobile app lacks some core features** found in the desktop version. This limits its usefulness for on-the-go planning.

How to Choose the Best Sunsama Free Alternative
-----------------------------------------------

If you’re thinking of switching from Sunsama, remember these points:

1.  **Comprehensive Task Management**: You need an app that allows you to [create tasks](https://www.flowlu.com/features/tasks/)
    , set deadlines, automate workflows and organize your work.
2.  **Seamless Calendar Integration**: Make sure the alternative solution syncs well with your existing calendar to keep all your meetings and tasks in one place.
3.  **User-Friendly Interface**: You probably agree that a clean and simple design makes it easier to plan your day without distractions.
4.  **Collaboration Features**: If you have teammates and coworkers, choose a tool that allows assigning tasks, sharing files, mentions/comments, team chat and [communicating within the app](https://www.flowlu.com/features/collaboration/)
    .
5.  **Cost-Effective**: Check if the app offers a free version or reasonably priced plans that fit your budget. Look for apps that offer ‘per team’ pricing to cut costs.

If you focus on these points we mentioned above, you can find a daily planner that not only addresses Sunsama’s limitations but also makes you more productive and suits your personal or professional workflow.

The Best Sunsama Competitors & Alternatives: Top Picks for 2025

Flowlu offers multiple task views—like Kanban, list, or calendar—so you can visualize work the way that suits your team best. With all your data in one place, making informed decisions is simpler than ever. It's all about reducing the effort of daily tasks, so you can focus on what really matters—growing your business and delivering value to your clients.

FAQs

See the most answers to the most frequently asked questions. You can find even more information in the knowledge base.

[Knowledge base](https://www.flowlu.com/help/)

What are the top free alternatives to Sunsama?

Many users seek cost-effective options that offer similar functionalities to Sunsama. Some notable free alternatives include Flowlu, Asana, and ClickUp. These platforms provide robust task management features without the associated costs.

Which Sunsama alternative offers the best integration capabilities?

Integration with other tools is important for efficient work. Platforms like Flowlu and Trello are recognized for their extensive integration options. They allow thor clients to connect with various 3rd-party applications to enhance productivity.

Can Flowlu replace Sunsama?

Flowlu can be a good alternative to Sunsama, but it depends on what you're looking for. While Sunsama focuses on daily planning and mindful task management, Flowlu is a more comprehensive business management tool. It includes task management, project planning, CRM, and finance tracking.

If you're mainly looking for a structured daily planner like Sunsama, Flowlu might feel a bit overwhelming with its broader feature set. Still, you can use its free plan to manage your tasks (including the mobile app) and disable all the modules you don’t need to simplify it into a planner.

However, if you need a tool that combines task organization with business management, Flowlu could be a strong alternative as well.

![Best Plutio Alternatives for Freelancers and Small Businesses](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/33129/plutio.776x0.webp)

Plutio is a handy platform for freelancers, small businesses, solopreneurs, and agencies. It offers tools for project management, invoicing, and working with clients.

Though it covers many essential features, some clients wish it had more customization or features tailored to their specific needs. For those companies exploring other options, there are alternative platforms that might be a better fit.

Why Consider Alternatives to Plutio?
------------------------------------

Although Plutio is versatile, some limitations could encourage users to consider alternatives:

*   **Limited Customization:** Plutio offers useful templates but it also does not include advanced customization for dashboards and workflows, which can be limiting for businesses needing specific project setups.
*   **Basic Project Management Tools:** For larger teams or complex projects, Plutio may lack advanced tools like Gantt charts or automated workflows, which are often essential for managing complex projects and tasks.
*   **Restricted Analytics:** Plutio’s reporting is somewhat basic, which can limit detailed tracking and decision-making, especially for businesses relying on data insights.
*   **Narrow Integration Options:** Plutio integrates with platforms like Slack but doesn’t have direct connections to some CRMs and accounting tools.
*   **Mobile Experience:** Plutio’s mobile app doesn’t fully mirror the desktop experience, which can make managing complex tasks on mobile more challenging.

Features to Seek in a Plutio Alternative
----------------------------------------

If Plutio isn’t fully meeting your needs, consider alternatives that provide:

*   **High Customization:** Look for platforms that allow custom views and workflows to match your specific business processes.
*   **Easy Integrations:** Look for an alternative that connects effortlessly with your CRM, billing, and communication tools.
*   **Detailed Analytics:** Strong reporting and analytics are essential to keep track of team performance and project milestones.
*   **Mobile Optimization:** Ensure the mobile app is intuitive and offers nearly full desktop functionality.
*   **Scalability:** Choose a tool that grows with your business, adding features as your team and project needs expand.

# Best Toggl Alternatives That Make Time Tracking Effortless

The Best Toggl Alternatives for Smarter, Simpler Time Tracking
==============================================================

![Ingrid Johansen](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/36298/ingrid_johansen-1.jpg)

Ingrid Johansen

Copywriter

February 27, 2025

9 min read

Table of contents

*   [What's Toggl All About?](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/toggl/#title_0)
    
*   [Why Look for Something Else?](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/toggl/#title_1)
    
*   [What Makes a Good Toggl Alternative?](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/toggl/#title_2)
    
*   [How to Choose the Right One for You](https://www.flowlu.com/alternative/toggl/#title_3)
    

Experience the power of organized workflows

Sign up for free to access Flowlu's project templates. Available for new accounts only.

[Start With Template](https://www.flowlu.com/templates/)

![The Best Toggl Alternatives for Smarter, Simpler Time Tracking](https://www.flowlu.com/site/assets/files/36280/toggltrack.776x0.webp)

Toggl is a solid time tracker, but it’s not for everyone. Whether you're tired of its pricing, missing features, or just want a fresh alternative, we’ve rounded up the best time tracking tools that might fit your needs better—no fluff, just real options.

So, you've been using Toggl for time tracking, huh? It's a solid tool, no doubt. But maybe you're starting to wonder if there's something out there that fits your needs a bit better. Let's dive into what Toggl offers, why some folks look for alternatives, and how you can find the best fit for you.

What's Toggl All About?
-----------------------

Toggl Track is a time-tracking app that's been a go-to for many freelancers and contractors. It's designed to help you quickly assign time blocks to tasks and projects without overcomplicating things. Plus, it syncs across all your devices, so whether you're on your phone or laptop, you're covered. And those reports? They give you a clear picture of where your time's going.

Why Look for Something Else?
----------------------------

Now, Toggl's great, but it's not perfect for everyone. Some users have pointed out a few hiccups:

*   **Learning Curve**: While it's packed with features, that can make it a bit overwhelming for newcomers. Some folks find it takes a while to get the hang of it.
*   **Pricing**: The free version is decent, but if you're after advanced features, the costs can add up. For small businesses or solo entrepreneurs, every penny counts.
*   **Offline Functionality**: There have been mentions of limited offline capabilities. If you're often without internet, this could be a snag.
*   **Mobile App Issues**: Some users have reported that the mobile app isn't as smooth as they'd like, with occasional glitches or sync problems.

What Makes a Good Toggl Alternative?
------------------------------------

If you're on the hunt for something different, here's what to keep an eye out for:

*   **User-Friendly Interface**: You want something that doesn't require a manual to figure out. Time is money, after all.
*   **Affordable Pricing**: Look for tools that offer the features you need without breaking the bank.
*   **Robust Offline Features**: Especially if you're on the go, make sure the app works well without constant internet.
*   **Reliable Mobile App**: A solid [mobile experience](https://www.flowlu.com/mobile/)
     is key. You don't want to wrestle with your phone just to track a task.

How to Choose the Right One for You
-----------------------------------

With so many options out there, how do you pick the right one? Here's a simple approach:

1.  **Identify Your Needs**: What features are must-haves for you? Maybe it's seamless invoicing, team collaboration tools, or detailed analytics.
2.  **Set a Budget**: Know what you're willing to spend. There are great free options, but sometimes paying a bit gets you exactly what you need.
3.  **Test Drive a Few**: Most tools offer free trials. Take advantage of them to see which feels right.
4.  **Read User Reviews**: See what others are saying. [Real-world experiences](https://www.flowlu.com/reviews/)
     can highlight pros and cons you might not have considered.

Remember, the best tool is the one that fits seamlessly into your workflow and makes your life easier. So, take your time, weigh your options, and you'll find the perfect match.

Best Toggl Competitors & Alternatives in 2025: Track Time Without the Hassle
